title: Dev's Better Wither Hearts
description: A resource pack to make the wither hearts more visible.
body:
💜 Dev's Better Wither Hearts – Minecraft Resource Pack

Give your withered hearts a total makeover with Dev's Better Wither Hearts, a Minecraft resource pack that reimagines the wither heart icons to be more visible and look better!

Each heart has been carefully redesigned to keep the vanilla feel while adding visual flair.

🖌️ Fresh new heart icons for full, half, and empty states.
🩸 Hardcore hearts included!


Made for [my other heart pack.](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/devs-heart-pack)
